# Claude ZeroClaw

> OpenAI-compatible API gateway for your Claude subscription.
> Built with Rust (core server) and JavaScript (config/utilities).

## Endpoints

- POST /v1/chat/completions — OpenAI-compatible chat completions (streaming + non-streaming)
- GET  /v1/models           — List available Claude models
- GET  /health              — Gateway health check

## Supported models

- claude-sonnet-4-20250514 (aliases: sonnet, gpt-4o, gpt-4)
- claude-opus-4-20250514   (aliases: opus)
- claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 (aliases: haiku, gpt-3.5-turbo, gpt-4o-mini)

## Configuration

All env vars use the CZG_ prefix. See .env.example.

## No API key required

Uses the Claude Code CLI from your existing Claude subscription.
Set any string as the OpenAI API key in your tools (e.g. "not-needed").
